summary: EEM Phase B: Travel Settlement + GL Reconciliation Testing Complete. Backend 100% PASS (29/29 tests). Frontend CRITICAL FAILURE - Settlement module not accessible via Finance portal navigation.

critical_bugs.issue: Settlement module (fin-settlement-queue) not accessible - menu item not visible in sidebar
critical_bugs.impact: BLOCKS Finance users from accessing Settlement module entirely. Backend APIs work perfectly but UI is inaccessible.
affected_routes: Finance portal → Kas & Pembayaran → Queue Settlement Dinas
details: Module is registered in moduleRegistry.js as 'fin-settlement-queue'
Module is listed in portalNav.js under Finance → 'KAS & PEMBAYARAN' section
Sidebar does not render 'Queue Settlement Dinas' menu item
Direct URL navigation does not work
Command palette (⌘K) does not find the module
Page redirects to login screen when attempting navigation

passed_tests: Backend: Submit and approve expense claim
Backend: Disburse expense claim with GL posting
Backend: Submit and approve travel request
Backend: Mark cash advance as paid with GL JE
Backend: Per diem configuration (list and update)
Backend: List settlements for travel request
Backend: Post GL settlement with correct journal entries
Backend: Outstanding advances report (2 items, Rp 2,000,000)
Backend: Journal entry verification (advance + settlement JEs created)
Backend: GL posting logic - Dr 6-3400 / Cr 1-1610 / Cr 1-1201 (additional scenario)

items.task: Fix Finance portal navigation to show Settlement module menu item
items.details: The 'Queue Settlement Dinas' menu item is not visible in Finance portal sidebar under 'KAS & PEMBAYARAN' section. Module is registered in moduleRegistry.js and portalNav.js but not rendering.
Direct URL navigation (?portal=finance&module=fin-settlement-queue) does not work. Page redirects to login screen.
Sidebar sections are not rendering properly. 'Available sections: []' when querying sidebar content.

items.task: Test Settlement module UI after navigation fix
items.details: Once navigation is fixed, verify: summary stats, tabs (My/Queue/Outstanding), settlement list, detail dialog, reconciliation card, GL preview, filters
test_scenarios: View settlement list with existing data
Verify reconciliation card shows correct amounts
Verify GL preview shows correct journal entries

tests: Get per diem calculation (Rp 350,000 x 4 days)

gl_posting_verification.status: CORRECT - Company pays additional Rp 500,000 to employee

phase_b_journal_entries.verification: Both JE numbers created successfully with correct GL accounts
